zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan verch Ieuan於大約1363年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根巴格藍時，她的父親Ieuan ap Lleision55歲，母親Efa ferch LLyweln50歲。她於大約1385年與John Kemeys在威爾士蒙姆爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1445年在威爾士享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan verch Ieuan于大约1363年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根巴格藍时，她的父亲Ieuan ap Lleision55岁，母亲Efa ferch LLyweln50岁。她于大约1385年与John Kemeys在威尔士蒙姆爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1445年在威尔士享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan verch Ieuan was born about 1363, in Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Ieuan ap Lleision, was 55 and her mother, Efa ferch LLyweln, was 50. She married John Kemeys about 1385, in Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1445, in Wales, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan verch Ieuan est née environ 1363, à Baglan, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Ieuan ap Lleision, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch LLyweln, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé John Kemeys environ 1385, à Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1445, à Galles, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan verch Ieuan um 1363 in Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan ap Lleision 55 und ihre Mutter Efa ferch LLyweln 50. Sie hat um 1385 in Monmouthshire, Wales John Kemeys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1445 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan verch Ieuanが約1363年にウェールズグラモーガンバグランで生まれた時，父Ieuan ap Lleisionは55歳，母Efa ferch LLywelnは50歳であった。約1385年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでJohn Kemeysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1445年にウェールズで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan verch Ieuan(이)가 대략 1363년 웨일스 글램르건 배글런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan ap Lleision(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Efa ferch LLyweln(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 John Kemeys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 웨일스에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan verch Ieuan nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Baglan, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan ap Lleision, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch LLyweln, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com John Kemeys aproximadamente 1385, em Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1445, em Gales, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan verch Ieuan родилась около 1363 г. в местности баглан, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ieuan ap Lleision было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch LLyweln, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Kemeys около 1385 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1445 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 84 лет.
